questionHtml: Outline how nucleosomes affect the transcription of DNA.
markschemeHtml:
1. (nucleosomes can) promote AND inhibit transcription of genes/expression of genes;
  2. (nucleosomes can) prevent transcription by (tight) condensation/supercoiling/packing of DNA;
  3. (nucleosomes can) allow/prevent binding of RNA polymerase/transcription factors;
  4. tagging/acetylation/methylation of nucleosomes/histones can promote/inhibit transcription;
  5. movement of histones/nucleosomes (along DNA) can affect which genes are transcribed;

‘Affects transcription’ is in the question — no mark.

meta.title: Outline how nucleosomes affect the transcription of DNA.
